schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram (PMJVK)
schemes.benefit: Physical infrastructure (schools, anganwadis, hospitals) in minority-concentrated areas
schemes.benefit_hi: अल्पसंख्यक बहुल क्षेत्रों में स्कूल, आँगनवाड़ी, अस्पताल बुनियादी ढाँचा

schemes.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Minority Students
schemes.benefit: Rs 1,000-1,100/month maintenance + Rs 500 book grant for Class 1-10
schemes.eligibility: Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Parsi students; income < Rs 1 lakh

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarship for Minority Students
schemes.benefit: Full fee + maintenance Rs 5,000-12,000/year for Class 11 to PhD
schemes.benefit_hi: कक्षा 11 से PhD तक पूरी फीस + ₹5,000-12,000/वर्ष रखरखाव

schemes.name: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship for Professional Courses
schemes.benefit: 100% course fee + Rs 10,000/year maintenance for technical/professional courses
schemes.eligibility: 6 minorities; income < Rs 2.5 lakh; scored 50%+ in qualifying exam

schemes.name: Nai Manzil Scheme
schemes.benefit: Bridge education (Class 8/10 certificate) + skill training for minority dropouts
schemes.benefit_hi: अल्पसंख्यक ड्रॉपआउट को कक्षा 8/10 प्रमाण + कौशल प्रशिक्षण
schemes.eligibility: Minority youth 17-35 years without Class 8 or 10 certificate

schemes.name: USTTAD — Upgrading Skills & Training in Traditional Arts
schemes.benefit: Skill training + certification in 20+ traditional crafts for minority artisans
schemes.benefit_hi: अल्पसंख्यक कारीगरों को 20+ पारंपरिक शिल्पों में कौशल प्रशिक्षण
schemes.eligibility: Minority community artisans (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Parsi, Jain)

schemes.name: Hamari Dharohar (Cultural Heritage)
schemes.benefit: Preservation/documentation of rich minority cultural heritage, museums, libraries
schemes.benefit_hi: अल्पसंख्यक सांस्कृतिक धरोहर संरक्षण, संग्रहालय, पुस्तकालय
schemes.eligibility: Minority cultural institutions and community organisations

schemes.name: Seekho aur Kamao (Learn & Earn)
schemes.benefit: Free market-relevant skill training + Rs 6,500-10,000/month stipend during training
schemes.eligibility: Minority youth aged 14-35 with minimum Class 5 qualification

schemes.name: Nai Roshni (Leadership for Minority Women)
schemes.benefit: Leadership training + awareness of government schemes for minority women
schemes.benefit_hi: अल्पसंख्यक महिलाओं को नेतृत्व प्रशिक्षण + सरकारी योजना जागरूकता

schemes.name: Jiyo Parsi Scheme
schemes.benefit: Medical assistance for fertility treatment + financial incentives for Parsi families having children
schemes.benefit_hi: पारसी परिवारों को प्रजनन उपचार + बच्चे होने पर वित्तीय प्रोत्साहन

schemes.name: Educational Infrastructure Development in Minority Areas (PMJVK)
schemes.benefit: Construction of model schools, degree colleges, ITIs in Minority Concentration Blocks
schemes.benefit_hi: MCB में मॉडल स्कूल, डिग्री कॉलेज, ITI का निर्माण
schemes.eligibility: Residents near sanctioned institutions in MCBs

schemes.name: National Minorities Development and Finance Corporation (NMDFC) Loans
schemes.benefit: Concessional loans 5-8% for education, self-employment up to Rs 20 lakh for minorities
schemes.benefit_hi: अल्पसंख्यकों को 5-8% पर ₹20 लाख तक शिक्षा/स्वरोजगार ऋण
schemes.eligibility: 6 minority communities, income < Rs 3 lakh (rural) / Rs 4 lakh (urban)

schemes.name: Free Coaching for Minority Students (Civil Services/JEE/NEET)
schemes.benefit: Free coaching at top institutes for UPSC, JEE, NEET, SSC, banking exams
schemes.benefit_hi: UPSC, JEE, NEET, SSC, बैंकिंग परीक्षाओं के लिए मुफ्त कोचिंग
schemes.eligibility: Minority students who cleared preliminary screening; income < Rs 8 lakh

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Minorities Empowerment Programme
schemes.benefit: Converged delivery of 15-point programme benefits to minority communities
schemes.benefit_hi: अल्पसंख्यकों तक 15 सूत्री कार्यक्रम का एकीकृत लाभ पहुँचाना

schemes.name: Minority Hostel Scheme
schemes.benefit: Hostel accommodation + mess for minority students studying away from home
schemes.benefit_hi: घर से दूर पढ़ रहे अल्पसंख्यक छात्रों को हॉस्टल + मेस सुविधा
schemes.eligibility: Minority students enrolled in recognized colleges/universities
